\title{A Toy Note on a Bounding Inequality}
\author{Test Author}
\maketitle

\section{Introduction}
This is a novel toy example used purely for testing the scanner.
% TODO fix this before anyone reads it

We restate the classical bound below; see \cite{smith2019}.

\begin{theorem}
\label{thm:main}
Let $u(t) \ge 0$ satisfy $u(t) \le a + b \int_0^t u(s)\,ds$ for all $t \ge 0$
with constants $a, b \ge 0$. Then $u(t) \le a\, e^{b t}$.
\end{theorem}

The missing figure would appear as Figure~\ref{fig:nowhere}, but it does not
exist here.

We also cite a work that is absent from the bibliography: \cite{ghost2020}.
